title: flaveria brownii
intro: Flaveria brownii, also known as Brown's Flaveria, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Flaveria brownii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
